# Anthropic Brand Styling Guide

This resource provides Anthropic's official brand identity standards for visual design and formatting.

## Color Palette

**Core Colors:**
- Dark (`#141413`) for primary text and backgrounds
- Light (`#faf9f5`) for light backgrounds
- Mid and light grays for secondary elements

**Accents:**
- Orange, blue, and green for visual emphasis

## Typography Standards

- Headings: Poppins (with Arial fallback)
- Body: Lora (with Georgia fallback)
- Headings at 24pt and larger receive the designated heading font

## Design Application

The styling system intelligently applies:
- Font selection based on text hierarchy
- Smart color choices relative to background contrast
- Accent color cycling for shapes and non-text elements
- Automatic fallbacks when brand fonts are not available
